name: Special Regular Cone
desc: Made with BAQ luxury henna powder and eucalyptus oil. Gives a red-to-brown stain; keep on skin for 4 hours for best results.

name: Premium Cone
desc: Made with lavender oil and luxury BAQ henna powder. Gives a maroon-dark color; lavender aroma is soothing and the paste is smooth.

name: Premium Nail Tint
desc: Made with tea extract and wheat flour. Apply for 6 hours for a deep maroon stain. For beautiful henna-stained nails.

name: Herbal Hair Pack
desc: Natural herb blend for strong, healthy hair. Supports thicker, shinier hair and a healthy scalp.
